summary: Nasogastric decompression has no established preventive benefit against postoperative leaks after laparoscopic sleeve gastrectomy; existing studies focus instead on bougie sizing and do not support this intervention’s use for prophylaxis. The primary risk factor reduction lies in proper surgical technique and stapler selection rather than pre-emptive gastric decompression.
